The '''droffi steed''' was a four-legged [[Reptile/Legends|reptilian]] native to [[Aridus/Legends|Aridus]]. The steed could store [[Water/Legends|water]] in its body tissues and it served as reliable transportation for the [[Chubbit]]s.

{{Creature-stub}}
